haiku:
Waddling in the snow,
Little tuxedos rejoice,
Joyful hearts unite.
Happy #WorldPenguinDay from @ClamBakeSanta

Sun-kissed gardens sway,
Zucchini's harvest whispers,
Baking dreams arise.
Happy #NationalZucchiniBreadDay from @ClamBakeSanta

Notes like silk arise,
Velvet nights wrapped in moonlight,
Joy dances and sings.
#HappyBirthdayEllaFitzgerald from @ClamBakeSanta
